message:
Refine connector_bundles API, add ConnectorCapability ordering, expand mux pool test coverage

connector_bundles.rs: simplified imports by consolidating
ConnectorLifecyclePhase from connector_host_runtime instead of
connector_lifecycle, removed unused SchemaVersion import. Changed
IngestionPipeline methods verify_chain(), export_json(), export_jsonl()
from &self to &mut self to match updated AuditChain API, and removed
#[must_use] attributes from these methods since the caller decides
whether to use the output.

connector_host_runtime.rs: added PartialOrd and Ord derives to
ConnectorCapability enum, enabling BTreeSet/BTreeMap usage and
deterministic ordering of capability sets in policy evaluation.

runtime.rs: minor import/config refinements in vendored runtime paths.

vendored/mux_pool.rs: added 227 lines of new test coverage including
additional pool recovery scenarios, connection lifecycle validation,
and edge case handling for mux pool operations.

.beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
